subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him whose scripture hath appeared before the Throne and who hath attained the presence of his Lord, the Mighty, the All-Knowing, that he may be assured that He Who speaketh doth make mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لمن حضر کتابه لدی العرش و فاز بمنظر ربه العزیز العلیم لیوقن انه یذکر من نطق
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
